name: litigation-legal-uk
description: Manages a UK litigation portfolio — matters, CPR deadlines, preservation notices, Letters Before Action, external solicitors and counsel — and does the work: claim charts (patent and civil under English law), chronologies, cross-examination prep, LPP logs, skeleton argument drafting. Adapts to how you work litigation in England & Wales, Scotland, and Northern Ireland: in-house, firm, or solo.
